creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

If you are looking for places to visit in Florida that will make you feel like you’ve been transported to another world, here is one of my favorites! The Ringling Museum in Sarasota, Florida! 

Watch till the end to learn how to get in for FREE! 

#hiddengemsflorida #sarasotamuseums #ringling #circusmuseum #historyflorida

transcription.text: Fairytale Places in Florida, Part 2. Welcome to the Ringling Museum in Sarasota, Florida. If the name Ringling sounds familiar, well that's because John Ringling was one of the five brothers that started the Ringling Brothers Circus in 1885. While exploring this property, you'll feel as if you just stepped into Europe. This 66-acre property has so many things to explore to include the Cottazan, which was John and Mabel Ringling's winter home, built in the 1920s. Also on the property are paved walking paths and some hidden paths through hundreds of centuries-old majestic banyan trees that you absolutely must explore. The museum and courtyard hold thousands of statues, art, and antiquities dating back 4,500 years. There are so many beautiful places to take pictures and you can even bring a picnic and sit on the beautiful Sarasota Bay to watch the dolphins play. Pro tip, visit the Ringling Museum on Mondays to get in for free, other days it's $25 per person. Save this post and follow along for more Fairytale Places to visit in Florida.
